---
name: Replication report
about: Report your own attempt to replicate a protocol or experiment from the archive
title: "replication: <article-slug> — n=<N>"
labels: ["replication"]
---

## Protocol replicated

<!-- File path to the article whose protocol you followed, e.g., articles/wim-hof-method/ -->

## Subjects

<!-- n = how many people. Single-subject (n=1) is welcome. -->

## Duration

<!-- e.g., 14 days, 8 weeks -->

## Deviations from the published protocol

<!-- Did you change anything? Note it here. -->

## What you measured

<!-- HRV, sleep score, mood journal, blood markers, etc. Raw data preferred. -->

## Result

<!-- Plain-language summary. -->

## Limitations

<!-- What would invalidate this report? Confounders, missed measurements, your own bias. -->

## Sources

<!-- Any references or related literature. -->

## Ready to submit as PR?

- [ ] Yes — I'll open a PR adding `replications/<article-slug>/<my-handle>-<date>.md`.
- [ ] No — leaving the data here for someone else to format and submit.
